title: Senior Teacher - TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services:
TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services!
